spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: Very small company (~250 employees, $163M revenue). Has a CTO role confirmed (LeadIQ). Technology focus is product/completion technology, not IT AI. No internal IT AI programs identified. Score 3.
spend_model_flags.channel_mismatch_notes: HQ Houston TX — within WWT STOLA territory. No channel conflict.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $162.6M — smallest Tier 1 company by far. ~250 employees. Revenue well below $10B — no OEM deduction. Houston HQ in STOLA. WWT opportunity extremely limited — company is too small for enterprise IT spend of meaningful scale. Included as Tier 1 due to CRM account presence. Confidence LOW.
